market_context: X sentiment shows cautious optimism with traders highlighting crypto strength and rotation into value stocks amid tech weakness. Pre-market futures are flat to slightly up with no major overnight news catalysts; VIX at 17.8 signals moderate volatility.

predictions.reasoning: Recent 5-day pullback of 0.9% and stable 10Y yield suggest short-covering bounce; X chatter points to dip-buying in broad indices.
Options flow shows elevated put activity and recent 5-day tech weakness; X users citing valuation concerns after prior run-up.
BTC already up 4% over 5 days with positive X sentiment on ETF inflows and risk-on rotation.
Short interest signals and X discussion around delivery concerns point to continued pressure despite broader market stability.
